system.agenda: Interfering with and impeding the path of the Hunters of the Order, preventing them from achieving their mission

gifts.name: Variable
gifts.description: The Shadow has all the Gifts of the original NPC.

gifts.name: Shadow Body
gifts.description: A Shadow is a darker, sadder version of the original. They can speak and behave like the character they are modelled after, but on careful inspection they will appear cold and mechanical. Once per Scene, a Shadow can appear or disappear from the darkness by moving through walls and other solid obstacles. When it spawns, it increases its OL by 1 because of the element of surprise. When it suffers the Wound that would kill it, the Shadow dissipates until its turn in the Exchange. At that point, it will emerge from the darkness as if nothing had happened. The Shadow will not reappear if the area the Hunters are in is fully illuminated with light sources or magic. The only way to truly destroy the Shadow is to expose it to sunlight.

system.background: A unique opponent created by Sherazade's power 'A Thousand and One Nights.' These Shadows are dark reflections of characters from scenarios the Hunters have already faced. They act as Opponent Dark Presences, serving Sherazade's will to impede the Hunters. When they have an obvious advantage, they say things like 'My Lady Sherazade will be proud of me.' When defeated, they may exit shouting 'My Lady Sherazade will avenge me' or dissipate leaving behind a small object typical of where Sherazade currently resides (a coin, garment, or poem). These items serve as focus to animate the Shadows. The Shadows cannot speak or act in places where there is more light than shadow. Sherazade can create a number of Shadows equal to the Hunters she faces plus one, with additional Shadows for each Hunter affected by her Words like Honey gift.
